samples.response:
Explain one optimization used in ultrafast fine-tuning. One optimization technique used in ultrafast fine-tuning is **gradient compression**. 

Gradient compression involves compressing the gradients (the derivatives of the loss function with respect to the model's parameters) before sending them back to the optimizer for weight updates. This reduces the amount of data that needs to be transmitted over the network, which can significantly speed up the training process.
